name: Node.js 20 Bot
author: nebula
description: Generic Node.js 20 runtime. Clones a git repo (optional), runs npm install, then starts your main file.

script: apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates
if [ -n "$GIT_REPO" ]; then git clone --depth 1 -b "$GIT_BRANCH" "$GIT_REPO" /home/container/_src && cp -a /home/container/_src/. /home/container/ && rm -rf /home/container/_src; fi
